@graph.description: Lemon Balm Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Sleep; Cognition; Stress Response; Neurobiology. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Neurotransmitter Modulation; Stress Response Modulation, not treatment claims.
